title: Proclamation No. 1776, s. 2009
text:
PROCLAMATION NO. 1776

CREATING AND DESIGNATING A BUILDING LOCATED AT NO. 72 N. ESCARIO STREET CORNER F. RAMOS EXTENSION, CAPITOL SITE, CEBU CITY, ISLAND OF CEBU, AS INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY CENTER PURSUANT TO REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7916 AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8748

Pursuant to the powers vested in me under Republic Act No.  7916, otherwise known as the Special Economic Zone Act of 1995 as amended by Republic Act No. 8748 and upon recommendation of the Board of Directors of the Philippine Economic Zone Authority, I, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO, President of the Philippines, do hereby create and designate, subject to the provisions of Republic Act No. 7916 as amended, its Implementing Rules and Regulations, Resolution No. 00-411 dated 29 December 2000 and Resolution No. 08-469 dated 10 September 2008 of the Board of Directors of the Philippine Economic Zone Authority, the DG3 I.T. Center as an Information Technology Center which stands on a Three Thousand Three Hundred Ten (3,310) square meter lot, more or less, located at No. 72 N. Escario Street corner F. Ramos Extension, Capitol Site, Cebu City, as defined by the following technical description:

“Lot 1-A, Psd-59807

TCT No. 187859

A parcel of land (Lot 1-A, of the subdivision plan, Psd-59807, being a portion of Lot 1, Block 16, described on plan, Pcs-565 (SWO-21860), LRC Rec. No. 598S), situated in the City of Cebu, Island of Cebu.

Bounded on the NE., along line 1-2, by Lot 2, Block 16, Pcs-565 (SWO-21860); on the E., along line 2-3, by Lot 898, Banilad Estate; and on the SW., along line 3-1, by Lot 1-B, of the subdivision plan.

Beginning at a point marked ‘1’ on plan, being N. 21 deg. 52′ E., 1015.64 m. from ‘C’, Banilad Estate.

thence

All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground as follows; Points 1 and 3, by old Pls cyl. conc. mons., 15 x 60 cms.; and point 2, by old Bl cyl. conc. mons., 15 x 60 cms. Bearings true, date of the original survey, August 1906-Juyl 1907, and that of the relocation survey, May 30-December 13, 1947, and that of the subdivision survey; October 26, 1960. Approved, January 10, 1961.

Lot 1-B, Psd-59807

TCT No. 187857

A parcel of land (Lot 1-B, of the subdivision plan Psd-59807, being a portion of Lot 1, Block 10, described on plan, Pcs 565 (SWO-21860), LRC Rec. No. 5988), situated in the City of Cebu, Island of Cebu.

Bounded on the NE., along line 1-2, by Lot 1-A of the subdivision plan; on the S. along line 2-3 by Lot 3, Block 37, Fls-1544-D; on the W., along line 3-4 by road Lot 33-A Pcs-565 (SWO-21860); on the NW., and N., along line 5-6-7, by Lot 3, Block 16; and on the E., along line 7-1, by Lot 2, Block 16, both of Pcs-565 (SWO-21860).

Beginning at a point marked ‘1’ on plan, being N. 21 deg. 52′ E., 1015.64 m. from Monument ‘C’, Banilad Estate.

Lot 2, Pcs-565

TCT No. 187856

A parcel of land (Lot No. 2, Sub-Block No. 16 of the consolidation and subdivision plan, Pcs-565, Sheet No. 4, being a portion of the consolidated Lots Nos. 4, 5, and 6, Block No. 37 of plan Fls-1544-D of Banilad Friar Lands Estate, GLRO Rec. No. 5938), situated in the Barrio of Fuente Osmeña, Municipality of Cebu, Province of Cebu (now City of Cebu).

Bounded on the NE., by Road Not No. 41 of plan Fls-1544-D; on the S., by Lot No. 898; on the SW, by Lot No. 1, Sub-Block No. 16 of the consolidation and subdivision plan; and on the NW., by Lot No. 3, Sub-Block No. 16 of the consolidation and subdivision plan.

Beginning at a point marked ‘1’ on plan, being N. 21 deg. 52′ E., 1015.64 m. from Monument ‘C’, Banilad Estate.

beginning; containing an area of Two Hundred and Seventy Eight (278) square meters more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and on the ground are marked by old Pls cyl. conc. mons., 15 x 60 cms., except pints 2 and 3 which are Pls cyl. conc. mons. 15 x 60 cms. Bearings true; declination 1 deg. 50’E. Date of the original survey, August 1906-July 1907 and that of the consolidation and subdivision survey, August 12-September 16, 1936.

Lot 41-A, Psd-67683

TCT No. 187858

A parcel of land (Lot 41-A, of the subdivision plan, Psd-67683, being a portion of Road Lot 41, Block 16, described on plan, Fls-1544-D (SWO-2J860), LRC Rec. No. 5988), situated in the City of Cebu, Island of Cebu.

Bounded on the NE., along lines 1-2-3, by Lot 1, Block 19, Pcs-565; on the SE., along line 344, by Lot 898, Banilad Estate; on the SW, along line 4-5, by Road Lot 41-C (Cebu Heights Co. Inc.) and on the NW, along line 5-1 by Road Lot 41-C (Province of Cebu), both of the subdivision plan.

Beginning at a point marked ‘1’ on plan, being N, 22 deg. 45′ E., 1043.09 m. from Monument ‘C’, Banilad Estate.

TCT No. 125389

Bounded on the N., by Lot 41, of plan Fls-1544 and Lot 1, Block 19 of plan Fls-565 on the E., by Lot 808-A-7; on the S., by 898-A-9; and on the W’., by Lot 898-A-11, all of the subdivision plan.

Lot 898-A-11, Psd-44501

Bounded on the N., by Lot 2, Block 16 of plan Fls-565 and Lot 41 of plan Fls-1544-B; on the E., by Lot 898-A-8; and on the S., by Lot 898-A-10, both of the subdivision plan; and on the W., by Lots 2 and 3, Block 37 of plan Fls-1544-D and Lot 1, Block 16 of plan Pcs-565.

IN WITNESS THEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed hereto.

Done in the City of Manila, this 18 th day of May, in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Nine.

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

By the President:

Executive Secretary

Source: Presidential Management Staff
